jobs.title: Associate Store Director, DC
jobs.content: <h3><strong>Overview</strong></h3><p>We are a people-powered&nbsp;ecosystem, brought to life by engaging online and offline experiences. Glossier is an iconic beauty brand that goes far beyond beauty.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Associate Store Director leads the Retail (Stores) team in our Washington, DC flagship store, ensuring an exceptional in-store experience for every customer.</p>

jobs.title: (Seasonal Sales Associate, Part-Time) Editor, Boston
jobs.content: <h3><strong>Overview</strong></h3><p>We are a people-powered ecosystem, brought to life by engaging online and offline experiences. Glossier's Creative team brings the brand to life across every customer touchpoint.</p><p><strong>The Role:</strong></p><p>The Seasonal Sales Associate (Editor) supports the Boston flagship store during the peak holiday season, delivering Glossier's signature Creative customer experience.</p>
